# CWE-335 safe — Incorrect Usage of Seeds in PRNG (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-335-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/binary"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func AssignSeatLottery(c *GinCtx) (string, error) {
	var n uint32
	if err := binary.Read(rand.Reader, binary.BigEndian, &n); err != nil {
		return "", err
	}
	ticket := strconv.FormatUint(uint64(n%50), 10)
	return ticket, nil
}
